india_trends.title: Vishal Mega Mart Q4 Results 2026: Net profit soars 46% to ₹167.9 crore, revenue jumps 22%
india_trends.summary: Vishal Mega Mart reported a net profit of ₹167.9 crore for Q4 2026, a 46% increase from ₹115.1 crore last year. Revenue rose over 22% to ₹3,138.6 crore compared to ₹2,566.5 crore in Q1 2025.

india_trends.title: Nifty Smallcap 100 on cusp of bull market: Is the rise sustainable amid Middle East war-led risks?
india_trends.summary: Most small-cap stocks corrected by more than 60% to 65% in the 15 to 18 months since 2024. This, according to analysts, has rendered valuations attractive compared to the relative underperformance seen in large-cap companies amid geopolitical uncertainties.

india_trends.title: HAL Q4 Results: Net profit rises 6% YoY to Rs 4,196 crore; revenue up 2%
india_trends.summary: HAL Q4 Results: The defence major’s revenue from operations rose 2% YoY to Rs 13,942 crore in Q4FY26, from Rs 13,700 crore reported in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.
